title: No Peeling Required Garlic Press Stainless Steel with Detachable Handle for Fine Mincing - Premium Garlic Mincer Tool, Rust-Proof, Easy to Clean, Dishwasher Safe Garlic Crusher with 5-Year Warranty
features: No Need to Peel, Mess-Free & Efficient – Skip the peeling! This ginger grater & garlic smasher crushes unpeeled garlic cloves effortlessly, leaving the skin behind & delivering perfectly minced garlic with zero mess

Detachable Handle with Round Grill Holes – Designed for fine mincing, this garlic chopper provides perfectly crushed garlic, ideal for garlic butter, dips like hummus, soups, roasted veggies, or homemade garlic-infused oils
Effortless Cleaning & Dishwasher Safe – No hinges or hooks to trap food. Simply rinse this garlic presser & garlic grinder under water or place it in the dishwasher for hassle-free maintenance

Durable, Premium Food-Grade Stainless Steel – This metal garlic press stainless steel tool is designed for everyday use and designed to last, thanks to its high-quality 304 steel construction, ensuring durability and safety in any kitchen

Perfect Kitchen Gift for Every Home Cook – This garlic grater & garlic masher makes an ideal gift, combining style & function. Perfect for anyone who enjoys using garlic presses, making kitchen prep quicker & easier
